title: [CODEREVIEW-2] generate.py FORMAT_VERSION=2 change may break existing vector consumers that hardcode v1 expectation
description: test/vectors/generate.py:29 - Changing default to 2 without updating all generated JSON files or test loaders in Python/C/Rust may cause validation failures in test/vectors/test_vectors.py or Zephyr tests. Needs regeneration of all vectors.
